active_parents.current_workstream: Executable registry, task/run/proof ledgers, and capture flywheel
active_parents.next_action: Use the promoted task/run/proof ledgers as the operating checklist and build review/promote/start commands.
active_parents.blocker: Studio Plan Board is not built yet; first slice is file-backed ledgers.

active_parents.title: Build Intent, Fulfillment Trace, and Workflow Data

active_parents.next_action: Instrument parallelBuild with stage boundaries, inputs, outputs, and proof events before changing execution order.
active_parents.blocker: Workflow-as-data and the pipeline visualizer are still open; Drive sync is complete.

active_parents.title: MBSH Reunion Site Execution
active_parents.current_workstream: Site-scoped backend, RSVP, sponsor, media, chatbot, deploy, content, and proof
active_parents.next_action: Create site-scoped tasks and promote reusable platform gaps back to parent plans.
